2026-04-25.title: Music App UI & Mobile Responsiveness
changes: Completely redesigned the Music App interface with modern glassmorphism, rounded corners, and better spacing.
Significantly improved the mobile layout, ensuring the player bar stacks gracefully on smaller screens.
Enhanced hover effects, active track styling, and volume control usability.

2026-03-24-4.title: Music App Overhaul & System Fixes
changes: Completely overhauled the Music App UI, fixing hover colors and reducing the footer thickness.
Implemented global background playback: music now continues playing even when the app is closed.
Music volume preference is now saved locally and restored on reload.
Added music terminal command to control playback (play, pause, next, prev, vol).
Added new Christmas music tracks and removed the old radio stream.
Resolved TypeScript compilation issues across the system (StartMenu, i18n, terminal commands).

2026-03-24-3.title: Window Management & Layout Fixes
changes: Fixed an issue where maximized windows would overlap or hide behind the taskbar.
Refined window dragging behavior to prevent windows from being dragged completely off-screen, maintaining visibility of the header.
Improved window resizing constraints allowing dynamic resizing while obeying minimum constraints and screen boundaries.

2026-03-24-2.title: Settings App Responsiveness & UI
changes: Completely revamped the Settings App with a modern design and smooth animations.
Added full mobile responsiveness with a scrollable top navigation bar for smaller screens.
Enhanced Theme and Wallpaper cards with hover effects, active indicators, and glassmorphism styling.

2026-03-24.title: Projects App UI Enhancement
changes: Redesigned the Projects App UI making it more modern and fancy.
Added unique project icons and dynamic mouse-tracking glow effects for project cards.
Improved transition and entrance animations within the Projects overview.

2026-03-23-2.title: Legacy Mode & UI Improvements
changes: Added Legacy OS Viewer (Time Machine) to explore v1 and v2 natively in a fullscreen iframe.
Increased default and minimum window sizes for OS applications to improve user experience.
Fixed terminal text formatting issues (proper newline parsing for app lists).
Added close button and Escape key listener to exit legacy mode safely.
Fixed: App name, random characters.

2026-03-23.title: Overhauled Design & Performance
changes: Complete Glassmorphism redesign across all OS interfaces.
New Changelog Viewer integration via the About app.
Comprehensive ESLint & Prettier rule enforcement and codebase formatting.
Minor bug fixes and performance optimizations in window management.
Added a brand new \u003cstrong\u003eContact App\u003c/strong\u003e with a modern glassmorphism design.
Refined the About App UI, unifying the look of social and contact buttons.
Improved the responsiveness of the Contact App to prevent scrolling cutoff on small screens.
2026-03-26.title: New Contact App & UI Polish

changes: Overhauled the \u003cstrong\u003eLight Theme\u003c/strong\u003e to be more modern, aesthetic, and softer on the eyes.
Introduced 3 new beautiful themes: \u003cstrong\u003eRose Red\u003c/strong\u003e, \u003cstrong\u003eOcean Cyan\u003c/strong\u003e, and \u003cstrong\u003eDracula Dark\u003c/strong\u003e.
2026-03-27.title: New Themes & Improved Light Mode

2026-03-27-2.title: Mobile Responsiveness & UI Improvements
changes: Enlarged window control buttons (minimize, maximize, close) for better accessibility.
Completely redesigned the Projects App into a modern split-view layout.
Fixed overlapping UI issues on mobile devices (e.g. apps getting cut off by the status bar).
Added responsive layouts to Projects, Settings, and About apps for optimal phone viewing.
Introduced platform-specific app visibility logic (showing certain apps only on desktop or mobile).

2026-04-17.title: Setup & Lock Screen Polish
changes: Added responsive UI styling for the Setup/License screen on small screens and large UI scales.
Enhanced the Lock Screen to gracefully handle smaller heights, preventing UI cutoff on 150% scaled displays.
Implemented automatic language detection based on browser preferences, falling back to English seamlessly.

2026-04-17-2.title: Global Scrollbars & Project Scrolling Fix
changes: Added a cool global OS-level custom scrollbar to match the modern aesthetic.
Fixed an issue in the Projects app where horizontal scrolling was broken on mobile devices.
Added scroll snapping to the Projects mobile top-bar for a smoother touch experience.

2026-04-18.title: New Terminal Commands & UI Fixes
changes: Fixed missing Project View translation in the Projects app.
Added a new killall root terminal command to instantly close all active windows.
Introduced visually impressive commands: neofetch, ping, df, matrix, and theme.
Corrected hardcoded terminal strings to exclusively utilize context.t for dynamic localization.

2026-04-27-3.title: Wolimby Games & Notepad
changes: Added a new \u003cstrong\u003eWolimby Games\u003c/strong\u003e app, integrating a vast library of games via an embedded iframe.
Surprise addition: A sleek \u003cstrong\u003eNotepad\u003c/strong\u003e application for quick note-taking and saving text files locally.
Both apps fully support desktop and mobile layouts with responsive designs.

2026-04-27-2.title: New Calculator Application
changes: Introduced a sleek, glassmorphic \u003cstrong\u003eCalculator\u003c/strong\u003e app as a surprise addition.
Features full keyboard support (numpad, operators, Enter, Backspace) for power users.
Includes a running history display and standard calculator functions (+, -, ×, ÷, +/-).

2026-04-27.title: Paint Application Overhaul
changes: Added a brand new \u003cstrong\u003ePaint\u003c/strong\u003e application for drawing and saving images.
Included multiple tools: Pencil, Eraser, Line, Rectangle, and Circle.
Added Undo/Redo functionality with history tracking.
Implemented fixed-size, manually resizable canvas (like MS Paint) with draggable handles and scrollbars.
Added Canvas Zoom functionality via Ctrl + / Ctrl - and Ctrl + Mouse Wheel, scaling perfectly.
Dynamic cursor representing brush size and color applied to all tools for precise drawing.
Globally disabled browser default zooming on the whole OS to ensure apps feel native.

2026-04-24.title: Privacy Policy & Setup Refinements
changes: Completely revamped the \u003cstrong\u003ePrivacy Policy\u003c/strong\u003e window with beautiful glassmorphism.
Created a dedicated \u003ccode\u003e/privacy\u003c/code\u003e subpage, embedded as an iframe in the Setup.
Fixed unscrollability in the Privacy Policy caused by a global Nuxt CSS rule.
Resolved text overflow on the long 'Accept' button in the Setup screen.
Fixed ASCII art wrapping and text processing issues in the 'neofetch' terminal command.
